info.title: Hosted Payment Page
info.description: Our Hosted Payment Page is an exhaustive solution for sellers that are not PCI DSS compliant and cannot hold card details. It allows you to receive payments in various ways (card payments, bank payments and alternative payment methods) as the payment/checkout page is fully hosted by PayMe.

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error)

sale_url.description: The URL of the IFRAME secured payment form to display to the buyer

payme_sale_code.description: Our unique sale code (for display purposes only)

price.description: Sale final price. For example, if the price is 50.75 (max 2 decimal points) the value that needs to be sent is 5075

transaction_id.description: Merchant's unique sale ID for correlation with us

status_error_details.example: Contact our Support team for further information

seller_payme_id.description: MPL. Your private key in PayMe system.

sale_price.description:
Sale final price.
For example, if the price is 50.75 (max 2 decimal points) the value that needs to be sent is 5075.
Note that the minimum value is 500.

product_name.description:
Short name and description of the product/service.
This text will be shown in the invoice as well, if the seller has enabled the invoices module in his account panel.
Limited to 500 characters

transaction_id.description: Merchant's unique sale ID for correlation with us

installments.description:
Amount of installments for the sale. We allow you to manually set the number of installments or to specify a top limit of installments for the buyer to choose from while paying.
Setting a fixed number of installments is simply entering a number between 1 and 12.
The sale will be initiated with this number of installments and the buyer will not be able to change it.
To set a range for the buyer to choose from, enter the following:
`103` - allow up to 3 installments
`106` - allow up to 6 installments
`109` - allow up to 9 installments
`112` - allow up to 12 installments

market_fee.description:
A decimal representing the percent of the sale price that is collected for the marketplace (includes VAT).
This fee is added on top of our fees and transferred to the marketplace once a month.
Default value is the market fee of the Seller, as set upon Seller creation.

sale_send_notification.description: Flag to send email and/or SMS notifications

sale_callback_url.description: Callback response to your page regarding call to our API. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings. Note that you may not send a "localhost" URL as value

sale_email.description: In case sale send notification is true provide the address to send email notification

sale_return_url.description: We will redirect the IFRAME and the buyer to this URL upon payment success. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings

sale_mobile.description: In case sale send notification is true, provide the phone number to send SMS notification, if the seller has enabled the SMS module in his account panel

sale_name.description: The name that will be displayed when sending a notification

capture_buyer.description: Flag for requesting the buyer's token for this payment (0 - do not capture token, 1 - capture token). For additional information see Tokens explanation below

buyer_perform_validation.description: Flag for performing an online validation of the card with the Issuer.

sale_type.description: You can find all the sale types [here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/okab0oj46ivn7-sale-types).

sale_payment_method.description:
the Payment method used to pay the sale.
For all the payment methods [click here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/payments/branches/V1.5/zqjehf9tm2jnk-payment-methods).
To display multi payment methods use `multi`.

layout.description:
IFRAME payment page layout. Optional attribute which may be used with "bit" sale_payment_method. Avai lable layouts are:dynamic, qr-sms or dynamic-loose 
dynamic loose removes the validation for the social ID and CVV.

language.description: Changes the language of the payment IFRAME to English, as well as the error messages. Default value is Hebrew (he)

order_number.description:
Purchase Order Number. Mandatory for level 2 / 3 card data.
Maximum length: 15 digits

items.description:
This is an object that should include multiple arrays. An array for each product (item) that is a part of this sale.
All parameters that are numeric or integer must be equal or more than 0.

name.description:
Name of the Item
Minimum length: 1 Character
Maximum length: 50 Characters

quantity.description:
Number of items,
Minimum length: 0 digits,
Maximum length: 6 digits

unit_price.description:
Price of single unit in pennies,
No length limitations

unit_measurement.description:
Unit of measurment,
Minimum length: 0 characters (nullable),
Maximum length: 12 characters

total.description:
Total Price After Discount,
Minimum length: 0 digits,
Maximum length: 10 digits

discount_total.description:
In negative pennies amount,
Minimum length: 0 digits (nullable),
Maximum length: 12 digits

description.description:
The item description,
Minimum length: 0 characters (nullable,
Maximum length: 150 characters

product_code.description:
The item catalog code.
Minimum length: 0 characters (nullable),
Maximum length: 100 characters

commodity_code.description:
The item's commodity code,
Minimum length: 0 digits (nullable),
Maximum length: unlimited

fees.description:
Amount of tax in pennies
No length

tax.description:
The tax collected as a part of the payment - In pennies,
Minimum length: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

duty.description:
The international fees collected as a part of the payment - In pennies,
Minimum lenth: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

discount.description:
The total discount given for the payment - In pennies,
Minimum length: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

shipping.description:
The shipping cost charged as a part of the payment - In pennies,
Minimum lenth: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

name.description:
Individual's full name/Company's name,
Maximum Length: 50 Characters

email.description:
Email address of the addressee,
Maximum Length: 100 Characters

phone.description:
Phone number of the addressee,
Maximum Length: 50 Characters

line1.description:
Line 1 of the shipping address,
No Limits.

line2.description:
Line 1 of the shipping address,
No Limits.

postal_code.description:
Postal code of the shipping address,
No Limits.

city.description:
City of the shipping address,
No Limits.

state.description:
State of the shipping address,
No Limits.

country.description:
Country of the shipping address,
No Limits.

name.description:
Individual's full name/Company's name,
No Limits.

email.description:
Email address of the payer,
No Limits.

phone.description:
Phone number of the payer,
No Limits.

line1.description:
Line 1 of the billing address,
No Limits.

line2.description:
Line 2 of the billing address,
No Limits.

postal_code.description:
Postal code of the billing address
No Limits.

city.description:
City of the billing address,
No Limits.

state.description:
State of the shipping address,
No Limits.

country.description:
Country of the billing address,
No Limits.

sale_price.description: Sale final price. For example, if the price is 50.75 (max 2 decimal points) the value that needs to be sent is 5075. Note that the minimum value is 500

product_name.description: Short name and description of the product/service. This text will be shown in the invoice as well, if the seller has enabled the invoices module in his account panel. Limited to 500 characters

transaction_id.description: Merchant's unique sale ID for correlation with us

installments.description: Amount of installments for the sale. For additional information see Note 1 below

market_fee.description: A decimal between 0.00 and 60.00 representing the percent of the sale price that is collected for the marketplace (includes VAT). This fee is added on top of our fees and transferred to the marketplace once a month. Default value is the market fee of the Seller, as set upon Seller creation

sale_callback_url.description: Callback response to your page regarding call to our API. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings. Note that you may not send a "localhost" URL as value

sale_return_url.description: We will redirect the IFRAME and the buyer to this URL upon payment success. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings

sale_send_notification.description: Flag to send email and/or SMS notifications

sale_email.description: In case sale send notification is true provide the address to send email notification

sale_mobile.description: In case sale send notification is true, provide the phone number to send SMS notification, if the seller has enabled the SMS module in his account panel

sale_name.description: The name that will be displayed when sending a notification

capture_buyer.description: Flag for requesting the buyer's token for this payment (0 - do not capture token, 1 - capture token). For additional information see Tokens explanation below

buyer_key.description: Buyer key for an instant-payment with the token. This key is received through the use of capture_buyer. Note that this attribute cannot co-exist with the capture_buyer parameter in the same request

buyer_perform_validation.description: Flag for performing an online validation of the card with the Issuer. Default value is true

sale_payment_method.description: Sale payment method. Available methods are: credit-card, bit, paypal, sepa, bacs, echeck, alipay-qr, funds-transfer. Default value is credit-card

layout.description: IFRAME payment page layout. Optional attribute which may be used with "bit" sale_payment_method. Available layouts are: dynamic, qr-sms. Default value is dynamic

language.description: Changes the language of the payment IFRAME to English, as well as the error messages. Default value is Hebrew (he)

post.description:
## Overview This endpoint can be used for the following actions: Action | Description ----|---- Basic Sale (J4) | Allows you to create a sale. Authorization (J5)| The requested amount gets reserved (blocked) on the credit card of the buyer for up to 168 hours.
You can find more information in our [Capture Sale Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/5hztg1usesrsf-capture-sale-authorization). Template Payment Page | Enables many payments on a single sale link, by different buyers.
You can find more information in our [Template Payment Page Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/cij4imxt4y3z2-template-payment-page). Create Payment With Buyer Key (Token)| Enables to capture token once the buyer pays (enter the payment details).
You can find more information in our [Create Payment With Buyer Key (Token) Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/dpm16r1dqtjs0-create-payment-with-buyer-key-token). **You can find examples of the request body in the top-right corner under "Examples".** * For all the sale types [click here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/okab0oj46ivn7-sale-types). * For all the payment methods [click here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/payments/branches/V1.5/zqjehf9tm2jnk-payment-methods). #### Callbacks Once the sale is paid successfully, we will notify the marketplace with the sale details with a POST of `type` `x-www-form-urlencoded` request to the marketplace Callback URL.
You can find the sale callback attributes [here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/i90qmmbdut067-sale-callbacks). #### Issuing an Invoice for a Business In the case where you are connected to our invoices services, you can send the following parameters as a part of your `generate-sale` API request to us when paying using a Token (saved card) in our platform. Please add the following parameters to your request: Parameter Name|Parameter Type|Example & Limitations --|--|-- `buyer_business_name`| `string` | The name of the business the invoice should be issued for. `buyer_business_code` | `integer` | The business code (VAT identifier) of the company the invoice is issued for. #### Multi Payment Methods Checkout Page To allow the buyer to select the payment method by himself, use `sale_payment_method="multi"`.
It will show your available payment methods (based on the added services in your account) in one payment page: Credit card, bit, ApplePay and GooglePay (soon).

No Limits.

line1.description:
Line 1 of the billing address,
No Limits.

line2.description:
Line 2 of the billing address,
No Limits.

postal_code.description:
Postal code of the billing address
No Limits.

city.description:
City of the billing address,
No Limits.

state.description:
State of the shipping address,
No Limits.

country.description:
Country of the billing address,
No Limits.

sale_price.description: Sale final price. For example, if the price is 50.75 (max 2 decimal points) the value that needs to be sent is 5075. Note that the minimum value is 500

product_name.description: Short name and description of the product/service. This text will be shown in the invoice as well, if the seller has enabled the invoices module in his account panel. Limited to 500 characters

transaction_id.description: Merchant's unique sale ID for correlation with us

installments.description: Amount of installments for the sale. For additional information see Note 1 below

market_fee.description: A decimal between 0.00 and 60.00 representing the percent of the sale price that is collected for the marketplace (includes VAT). This fee is added on top of our fees and transferred to the marketplace once a month. Default value is the market fee of the Seller, as set upon Seller creation

sale_callback_url.description: Callback response to your page regarding call to our API. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings. Note that you may not send a "localhost" URL as value

sale_return_url.description: We will redirect the IFRAME and the buyer to this URL upon payment success. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings

sale_send_notification.description: Flag to send email and/or SMS notifications

sale_email.description: In case sale send notification is true provide the address to send email notification

sale_mobile.description: In case sale send notification is true, provide the phone number to send SMS notification, if the seller has enabled the SMS module in his account panel

sale_name.description: The name that will be displayed when sending a notification

capture_buyer.description: Flag for requesting the buyer's token for this payment (0 - do not capture token, 1 - capture token). For additional information see Tokens explanation below

buyer_key.description: Buyer key for an instant-payment with the token. This key is received through the use of capture_buyer. Note that this attribute cannot co-exist with the capture_buyer parameter in the same request

buyer_perform_validation.description: Flag for performing an online validation of the card with the Issuer. Default value is true

sale_payment_method.description: Sale payment method. Available methods are: credit-card, bit, paypal, sepa, bacs, echeck, alipay-qr, funds-transfer. Default value is credit-card

layout.description: IFRAME payment page layout. Optional attribute which may be used with "bit" sale_payment_method. Available layouts are: dynamic, qr-sms. Default value is dynamic

language.description: Changes the language of the payment IFRAME to English, as well as the error messages. Default value is Hebrew (he)

post - copy 3.description:
## Overview This endpoint can be used for the following actions: Action | Description ----|---- Basic Sale (J4) | Allows you to create a sale. Aothorization (J5)| The requested amount gets reserved (blocked) on the credit card of the buyer for up to 168 hours.
You can find more information in our [Capture Sale Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/5hztg1usesrsf-capture-sale-authorization). Multi Payment Page | Enables payments on a single sale link, by multiple buyers.
You can find more information in our [Multi Payment Page Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/cij4imxt4y3z2-multi-payment-page). Create Payment With Buyer Key (Token)| Enables to capture token once the buyer pays (enter the payment details).
You can find more information in our [Create Payment With Buyer Key (Token) Guide](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/dpm16r1dqtjs0-create-payment-with-buyer-key-token). **You can find examples of the request body in the top-right corner under "Examples".** * For all the sale types [click here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/okab0oj46ivn7-sale-types). * For all the payment methods [click here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/payments/branches/V1.5/zqjehf9tm2jnk-payment-methods). #### Callbacks Once the sale is paid successfully, we will notify the marketplace with the sale details with a POST of `type` `x-www-form-urlencoded` request to the marketplace Callback URL.
You can find the sale callback attributes [here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/i90qmmbdut067-sale-callbacks). #### Issuing an Invoice for a Business In the case where you are connected to our invoices services, you can send the following parameters as a part of your `generate-sale` API request to us when paying using a Token (saved card) in our platform. Please add the following parameters to your request: Parameter Name|Parameter Type|Example & Limitations --|--|-- `buyer_business_name`| `string` | The name of the business the invoice should be issued for. `buyer_business_code` | `integer` | The business code (VAT identifier) of the company the invoice is issued for.

status_code.description: Status of the request (0 - success, 1 - error)

sale_url.description: The URL of the IFRAME secured payment form to display to the buyer

payme_sale_code.description: Our unique sale code (for display purposes only)

price.description: Sale final price. For example, if the price is 50.75 (max 2 decimal points) the value that needs to be sent is 5075

transaction_id.description: Merchant's unique sale ID for correlation with us

status_error_details.example: Contact our Support team for further information

seller_payme_id.description: MPL. Your private key in PayMe system.

sale_price.description:
Sale final price.
For example, if the price is 50.75 (max 2 decimal points) the value that needs to be sent is 5075.
Note that the minimum value is 500.

product_name.description:
Short name and description of the product/service.
This text will be shown in the invoice as well, if the seller has enabled the invoices module in his account panel.
Limited to 500 characters

transaction_id.description: Merchant's unique sale ID for correlation with us

installments.description:
Amount of installments for the sale. We allow you to manually set the number of installments or to specify a top limit of installments for the buyer to choose from while paying.
Setting a fixed number of installments is simply entering a number between 1 and 12.
The sale will be initiated with this number of installments and the buyer will not be able to change it.
To set a range for the buyer to choose from, enter the following:
`103` - allow up to 3 installments
`106` - allow up to 6 installments
`109` - allow up to 9 installments
`112` - allow up to 12 installments

market_fee.description:
A decimal representing the percent of the sale price that is collected for the marketplace (includes VAT).
This fee is added on top of our fees and transferred to the marketplace once a month.
Default value is the market fee of the Seller, as set upon Seller creation.

sale_send_notification.description: Flag to send email and/or SMS notifications

sale_callback_url.description: Callback response to your page regarding call to our API. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings. Note that you may not send a "localhost" URL as value

sale_email.description: In case sale send notification is true provide the address to send email notification

sale_return_url.description: We will redirect the IFRAME and the buyer to this URL upon payment success. Default value is taken from the Merchant's settings

sale_mobile.description: In case sale send notification is true, provide the phone number to send SMS notification, if the seller has enabled the SMS module in his account panel

sale_name.description: The name that will be displayed when sending a notification

capture_buyer.description: Flag for requesting the buyer's token for this payment (0 - do not capture token, 1 - capture token). For additional information see Tokens explanation below

buyer_perform_validation.description: Flag for performing an online validation of the card with the Issuer.

sale_type.description: You can find all the sale types [here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/guides/branches/main/okab0oj46ivn7-sale-types).

sale_payment_method.description:
the Payment method used to pay the sale.
For all the payment methods [click here](https://payme.stoplight.io/docs/payments/branches/V1.5/zqjehf9tm2jnk-payment-methods).

layout.description:
IFRAME payment page layout. Optional attribute which may be used with "bit" sale_payment_method. Avai lable layouts are:dynamic, qr-sms or dynamic-loose 
dynamic loose removes the validation for the social ID and CVV.

language.description: Changes the language of the payment IFRAME to English, as well as the error messages. Default value is Hebrew (he)

order_number.description:
Purchase Order Number. Mandatory for level 2 / 3 card data.
Maximum length: 15 digits

items.description:
This is an object that should include multiple arrays. An array for each product (item) that is a part of this sale.
All parameters that are numeric or integer must be equal or more than 0.

name.description:
Name of the Item
Minimum length: 1 Character
Maximum length: 50 Characters

quantity.description:
Number of items,
Minimum length: 0 digits,
Maximum length: 6 digits

unit_price.description:
Price of single unit in pennies,
No length limitations

unit_measurement.description:
Unit of measurment,
Minimum length: 0 characters (nullable),
Maximum length: 12 characters

total.description:
Total Price After Discount,
Minimum length: 0 digits,
Maximum length: 10 digits

discount_total.description:
In negative pennies amount,
Minimum length: 0 digits (nullable),
Maximum length: 12 digits

description.description:
The item description,
Minimum length: 0 characters (nullable,
Maximum length: 150 characters

product_code.description:
The item catalog code.
Minimum length: 0 characters (nullable),
Maximum length: 100 characters

commodity_code.description:
The item's commodity code,
Minimum length: 0 digits (nullable),
Maximum length: unlimited

fees.description:
Amount of tax in pennies
No length

tax.description:
The tax collected as a part of the payment - In pennies,
Minimum length: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

duty.description:
The international fees collected as a part of the payment - In pennies,
Minimum lenth: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

discount.description:
The total discount given for the payment - In pennies,
Minimum length: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

shipping.description:
The shipping cost charged as a part of the payment - In pennies,
Minimum lenth: 0,
Maximum Length: 12 Digits

name.description:
Individual's full name/Company's name,
Maximum Length: 50 Characters

email.description:
Email address of the addressee,
Maximum Length: 100 Characters

phone.description:
Phone number of the addressee,
Maximum Length: 50 Characters

Line 1 of the shipping address,

No Limits.

No Limits.
